creator: dgilbert@velocet.net
text:
I have had a number of lockups accessing the quantum (which
didn't give problems under 2.2.7).  Some of the lockups will return if
I'm patient enough, others will reboot the machine eventually, some just
seem to hang until I reboot.  This only seems to happen with activity
on the Quantum drive.

Fix: 

None known.
How-To-Repeat: 
	I can make my machine available for testing fixes/investigation.
